jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at PGIMER - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
PGIMER, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PGIMER:
PGIMER is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PGIMER!
